meaning: n.[语]{逻}指号过程(指语言或非语言起记号指代作用的过程)
examples: Semiosis means to represent an object with another object.
Adopting a systemic functional view of semiosis, which states that meaning comes from choices from semiotic systems, we formulate the framework of how non-linguistic resources make meaning.
Then we realize once again that we can only know what it is if we come to understand--in this case, probably, it's best to say a cultural system, understood as a semiosis, within which it appears.
